mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id FROM chat_conversation WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND last_active_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{withinMinutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY last_active_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_conversation (member_id, title, started_at, last_active_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{title}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO chat_message (conversation_id, sender, message_content, faq_id, answer_type) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{sender}, #{messageContent}, #{faqId}, #{answerType})
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_conversation SET last_active_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
